'''Reks''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] characterized by slender, whip-like bodies. They had thin skin with the texture and temperature of lukewarm rubber. All Reks had brightly-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; purple was a common iris color for the [[Gender/Legends|females]] of the species. Many Reks sought work as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. A group of several Rek bounty hunters working for the crimelord [[Nandreeson]] captured [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and gave him over to their employer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
